commit.message:
Fix game hang by correcting CPU branch timing

Branch taken (+1) and page-crossing (+2) cycle penalties were lost because
branch() incremented this.cycles but execute() overwrote it with the base
cost. Use a branchPenalty field that gets added after execute() returns.
Also remove temporary debug instrumentation from PPU and NesEmulator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add component diagram in draw.io format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix game hang after screensaver by delivering APU frame counter IRQs to CPU

The APU's isIrqPending() was never checked in the main loop, so games
relying on APU IRQs for timing (e.g. Double Dragon & Battletoads) would
spin indefinitely waiting for an interrupt that never fired.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add APU implementation for sound support

Implement NES Audio Processing Unit with pulse, triangle, and noise
channels, wired into the CPU bus and main emulation loop. Audio output
uses javax.sound.sampled at 44100 Hz.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix game freeze after title screen by adding NMI edge detection, PRG RAM, and DMA NMI handling

- Trigger NMI immediately when game enables NMI via PPUCTRL while VBlank is active
- Add 8KB PRG RAM at $6000-$7FFF so game state reads/writes work correctly
- Check for NMI during DMA transfer to avoid missing VBlank interrupts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add README with architecture overview, setup, and API docs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement notification system with server cluster, workers, emulators, and load testing

- Notification server: REST API, input validation, template rendering, Redis caching, RabbitMQ routing
- Notification worker: 4 dedicated queue consumers (APNS/FCM/SMS/EMAIL) with retry logic
- Third-party emulator: simulates delivery services with 95% success rate
- Device emulator: receives notifications, WebSocket broadcast, REST stats
- Load client: seeds test data, multi-threaded load test with p95/p99 reporting
- Infrastructure: PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, Prometheus, Grafana with pre-provisioned dashboard
- Docker Compose with service health checks and replicas
- 27 unit tests covering validation, services, controllers, consumers
- Component diagram in drawio format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement Extended Link Opaque LSA parser and database detail display

- Parse Extended Link TLV (RFC 7684 §3) with Adj-SID (RFC 8665 §5)
  and LAN Adj-SID (RFC 8665 §6) Sub-TLVs
- Add show database detail output for Extended Link LSAs
- Clean up remaining debug println statements in ifsm.rs and inst.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement OSPF SR TLV parsing and database detail display

- Move SidLabelTlv to packet-utils crate for sharing between isis-packet and ospf-packet
- Add OSPF-style SID/Label Sub-TLV parser (2+2 byte header vs IS-IS 1+1)
- Parse RouterInfo TLVs: SID/Label Range, Local Block, Router Capability, Algorithm
- Implement Extended Prefix Opaque LSA parser (RFC 7684) with Prefix SID Sub-TLV (RFC 8665)
- Add "show ip ospf database detail" output for Opaque Area LSAs with SR details
- Clean up debug println statements in nfsm.rs

improve: add agent workflow lessons from Sarah Sweeps epic (#4)

Captures patterns learned during Epic #14 (STARTER_PLAN_COMPLIANCE):

- QA Agent Handoff Protocol: main agent must start dev server, gather
  credentials, and confirm app responds before dispatching qa-engineer
- Subagent Sandbox Restrictions: npm install and browser installs are
  blocked; use Playwright MCP server instead
- DevOps Agent Prerequisites: verify Docker CLI exists and discover
  container names via docker compose ps before assuming name format
- PM standard questions: always ask about plan/tier gating and rate
  limit thresholds before engineering begins

commit.message:
fix(mcp): replace panic with safe fallback in get_task_modifier()

CRITICAL FIX: The get_task_modifier() function used .expect() which
could panic if DEFAULT modifier was missing from config. Replace with
static LazyLock fallback using .unwrap_or().

Changes:
- Add static DEFAULT_TASK_MODIFIER using LazyLock
- Replace .expect() with .unwrap_or(&DEFAULT_TASK_MODIFIER)
- Safe fallback if YAML config lacks DEFAULT entry

Verified:
- 358 tests pass
- Clippy clean (zero warnings)
- CSR 100% after migration 061 (64 NATIVE_OF arcs created)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add native image support for early-fusion VLMs (MLX)

- Add generateWithNativeImage/generateStreamingWithNativeImage to
  LlamaEngine protocol for engines that handle images internally
- MLXEngine implements these using UserInput + CIImage, letting
  mlx-vlm's processor handle image encoding natively
- LlamaSession routes to native image methods when
  engine.supportsNativeImage is true, bypassing the CLIP visionEncoder
- Refactor streamGenerate to use shared token handler, eliminating
  duplicated callback code across all 3 generation paths

commit.message:
Fix critical memory leaks — 1.47GB overnight usage

- Cap poopWindows at 8 max (auto-remove oldest), was unbounded
- Cap particles at 300 max to prevent memory bloat
- Use removeAll(where:) for O(n) particle cleanup instead of O(n²)
- Store main timers (mainUpdateTimer, statsDecayTimer) as properties
- Clean up pawPrintTimers when they fire
- Remove unused spriteCache variable
- Fix .gitignore: was ignoring Sources/Murchi/ and Package.swift

commit.message:
fix: camera+text broken, voice agent watchdog, volume reset, add Honeywell/Emerson

- Camera+text: backend was stripping manually-attached photos via visual keyword
  filter. Added image_manual flag so only auto-captured frames get filtered.
  Also expanded keyword list (diagnose, what's wrong, inspect, etc.)
- Job mode: LiveKit agent had no restart mechanism — if it crashed (Render free
  tier sleep), it stayed dead. Added watchdog loop in start.sh to auto-restart.
- Volume reset: iOS audio session was being toggled 13 times per voice turn
  (allowsRecordingIOS true/false). Removed redundant setAudioModeAsync calls
  from recorder pause/stop/chunk and VAD pause/end. Now only 2 switches per
  turn (record start, playback start).
- Added Honeywell (8 codes) and Emerson (6 codes) to error code database
  with STT aliases. Total brands now 21.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Implement firmware version scheme and document versioning in CLAUDE.md (#12)

* Implement firmware version scheme (closes #8)

- Add version.h with FW_VERSION_MAJOR/MINOR/PATCH defines, a packed
  uint32_t (FW_VERSION_INT), a FIRMWARE_VERSION string macro, and a
  FIRMWARE_BUILD_TIMESTAMP macro using __DATE__/__TIME__
- Print version and build timestamp to serial on boot
- Inject version and timestamp into config web UI footer (read-only)
- Include version.h in tests/sketch_api.h so all test TUs share the macros
- Add InjectsFirmwareVersion and InjectsBuildTimestamp tests to
  test_handle_root; timestamp test checks for the "built " label to
  avoid cross-TU __DATE__/__TIME__ skew

https://claude.ai/code/session_01GugykGQ1mGzXtzCzk3MvLT

* Document versioning scheme in CLAUDE.md

Adds a Versioning section explaining when to bump major/minor/patch,
how to do it (edit version.h only), and when in the workflow to bump
(same commit as the feature/fix, before pushing).

https://claude.ai/code/session_01GugykGQ1mGzXtzCzk3MvLT

---------

fix: scraper auto-delete safe during live events

Phase 2 deletion now requires BOTH:
- not any_newly_completed (nothing transitioned upcoming→completed this run)
- event_is_past using date.today() local time (not utcnow, which rolls to
  next day before US events end)

Operations, Admin) with sub-tab navigation and completion indicator on Business Setup.
Admin category hidden for non-admin users.

Quote Builder: Convert single-page quote form into 4-step wizard (Customer → Services →
Terms → Review) using client-side show/hide. Step 1 enforces client+property selection
before proceeding. Step 4 shows read-only preview. Stepper dots clickable for backward
navigation. Edit mode allows free step navigation. Zero existing JS functions modified.

Employee Onboarding: New full-page wizard at /crm/team/onboard.php with 3 steps
(Basic Info → Role & Permissions → Send Install Link). Role cards show plain-English
descriptions of what each role can/cannot do. Uses existing employees.php and
send-install-link.php APIs.

Fix deleted items reappearing after refresh in other browsers

local items and re-pushed to Supabase. Now they are correctly treated
as remotely deleted on the first pull (before knownRemoteIds is populated).

commit.message:
Hockey Ticket Finder with Streamlit app

Find NHL tickets matching seat preferences. Scrapes Ticketmaster for
seat-level inventory, scores listings based on configurable position
preferences (center ice, shooting side, price, section level), and
visualizes results on an interactive arena map.

Features:
- Stealth browser intercepts TM ISMDS APIs for inventory + pricing
- Decodes seat manifest place IDs for actual row/seat numbers
- Auto-detects shooting direction via NHL API + TM "Attack Twice" labels
- Home/away/neutral scoring based on favorite team
- Configurable scoring curve and last-row-only filter
- Streamlit web app with password auth for deployment
- CLI mode: python -m hockey_tickets --team "Boston Bruins" --date 2026-03-10
- 125 tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add learned energy landscape for self-improving ODE

Implements learned energy components (structural, execution, flow,
verification) with contrastive training from correct/incorrect pairs.
Each cycle trains the energy landscape alongside the generator.
Energy-guided refinement activates from cycle 1 onward.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Query node missing from GUI node palette

The Query node was silently disappearing from the Add Node menu because
importing query_node.py failed at module load time. The root cause was
llm_utils.py importing `litellm` at the top level — when litellm isn't
installed, the entire import chain (query_node -> llm_utils -> litellm)
fails with an ImportError. The node discovery mechanism in node_loader.py
caught this error but logged it at DEBUG level, making it invisible.

Changes:
- Move `import litellm` from module-level to inside query_llm_with_tokens()
  where it's actually used (lazy import), so the module can be imported
  without litellm installed
- Upgrade node_loader discovery error logging from DEBUG to WARNING so
  failed node type loads are visible in server output

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
add Anthropic Claude provider with API key auth

- Implement Anthropic Messages API provider (tool_use, retry on 429/5xx,
  full GenParams support, cost estimation for opus/sonnet/haiku)
- Add ClaudeToken store at ~/.config/v100/anthropic_auth.json
- Add `v100 login --provider anthropic` (prompts for API key from Console)
- Add `v100 logout --provider anthropic` to remove stored key
- Update doctor to check stored key with redacted hint, fallback to env var
- Provider resolves key from stored file first, then ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env
- Tests: message conversion, response parsing, cost estimation, key resolution

Note: Anthropic Admin API cannot create API keys programmatically (confirmed
in their docs FAQ). Console OAuth is not available to third parties. API key
paste-and-store is the practical auth path, matching gh/railway CLI patterns.
